title: BL9 8QZ, Valencia Waste Management Limited: Environmental permit draft decision advertisement – EPR/BS7951IB/V019
body: "The Environment Agency consults the public on certain environmental permit applications for:    waste and mining waste operations   installations    *water discharge and groundwater activities  *medium combustion plant and specified generators  In some cases it also consult on draft decisions for environmental permits. The arrangements are explained in its Public Participation Statement  These notices explain:    the Environment Agency’s proposed decision and the reasons and considerations on which it’s based this   additional relevant information available since the application was advertised   any information or guidance provided by the Secretary of State relevant to the application   "
